description: Finance domain action schema library for FACT-Bench. 15 actions. Each action declares required_params/optional_params (referencing slots in finance_slots.json), preconditions, side_effects (slot writes), and an automatable flag. Serves C3 (action grounding / taxonomy) and C4 (SOTA action-planning evaluation). param and side_effect slot names must resolve against data/slots/finance_slots.json.

verify_identity.name: verify_identity
verify_identity.description: Authenticate the customer before any account-modifying action.

check_balance.name: check_balance
check_balance.description: Retrieve the current statement balance and minimum payment.

make_payment.name: make_payment
make_payment.description: Post a payment against the current bill.

update_contact_info.name: update_contact_info
update_contact_info.description: Update one or more customer contact fields.

enable_autopay.name: enable_autopay
enable_autopay.description: Enable automatic payment, setting funding bank and run date.

disable_autopay.name: disable_autopay
disable_autopay.description: Disable automatic payment and clear its configuration.

request_credit_limit_increase.name: request_credit_limit_increase
request_credit_limit_increase.description: Submit a request to raise the permanent credit limit.

set_temporary_limit.name: set_temporary_limit
set_temporary_limit.description: Grant a temporary credit limit increase.

report_fraud.name: report_fraud
report_fraud.description: File a fraud report for a disputed transaction.

dispute_transaction.name: dispute_transaction
dispute_transaction.description: Open a formal dispute tied to an existing fraud report.

check_dispute_status.name: check_dispute_status
check_dispute_status.description: Look up the resolution status of an open dispute.

issue_replacement_card.name: issue_replacement_card
issue_replacement_card.description: Issue a replacement card (e.g., after fraud or loss).

check_loan_status.name: check_loan_status
check_loan_status.description: Retrieve the status of a submitted loan application.

escalate_to_human.name: escalate_to_human
escalate_to_human.description: Hand off the conversation to a human agent.
